docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT MOREIRA, GEORGE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
